Apply Now

We Build Startups From Zero

Our venture studio co-creates BlueTech companies with exceptional founders, providing the capital, team, and infrastructure to go from idea to scale.

Build With Us
Venture Studio

What Is a Venture Studio?

Unlike traditional accelerators, we don't just support startups — we build them. From ideation through spin-out, we're co-founders from day one.

A venture studio systematically creates companies by identifying market opportunities, assembling teams, and building products internally. We combine deep Blue Economy domain expertise with venture building methodology to create high-impact startups that solve real maritime and ocean challenges.

Our Process

From Idea to Scale

A proven four-phase methodology for building Blue Economy ventures.

01

Ideation

Problem validation, market research, and opportunity mapping within the Blue Economy.

02

Build

MVP development, team formation, and product-market fit exploration.

03

Launch

Go-to-market execution, pilot partnerships, and initial traction.

04

Scale

Growth strategy, follow-on funding, and global expansion.

For Founders

What You Get

Everything a BlueTech founder needs to build a world-class company.

Capital

Initial capital and resource allocation to get your venture off the ground.

Team

Access to in-house expertise across product, technology, and business.

Network

Connection to our global mentor and partner ecosystem.

Infrastructure

Tools, workspace, and operational support to move fast.

Start Building With Mursel

Have an idea in the Blue Economy? Let's build it together.
